loginRequiredBranding: Sign in to edit logo and cover image.

qr.title: QR code
qr.description: Generate and download a QR code linking to your digital menu.

branding.title: Logo / cover image
branding.description: Restaurant logo and cover photo shown at the top of Live Menu.

google.title: Google reviews
google.description: Connect your menu with Google so guests can leave reviews in one click.

feedback.title: Feedback & suggestions
feedback.description: Let guests send comments and suggestions from Live Menu directly to your email.

subscription.title: Manage subscription
subscription.description: Your plan, Stripe billing, and upgrading to Premium.

qr.title: Your Menu QR Generator
qr.introLoggedIn: Scan the code above or share this link with guests so they can browse your menu online.
qr.introLoggedOut: Sign in to generate a unique link and QR code for your menu.

google.title: Google reviews
google.intro: Paste your Google Place ID so guests can quickly leave ratings directly from your menu.

errors.fetchFailed: Could not fetch Google Place ID.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save Google Place ID.

feedback.title: Feedback & suggestions
feedback.intro: Let guests send comments, complaints and suggestions directly from Live Menu. Messages will go to your email address.
feedback.enableHelp: Section at the bottom of the public menu with a message form
feedback.emailRequired: Add an email so the feedback section is visible in Live Menu.

subscription.premiumStripeHelp: Subscription is linked to Stripe — you can change card, download invoices or cancel the plan.
subscription.premiumManualHelp: Premium account is active. Billing is managed outside the standard Stripe portal (e.g. custom agreement).
subscription.trialHelp: During trial you have a limited pool of AI tokens. Upgrade to Premium to unlock full features.
subscription.freeHelp: Free plan — your own photos in the menu. Premium unlocks AI generation and recommendations.
subscription.stripePortalHelp: Stripe portal lets you change payment method, view invoices and cancel subscription. After cancellation your account returns to the free plan when the paid period ends.

branding.title: Logo and cover image (visible in Live Menu)
branding.intro: Upload logo and header background image. Choose element (logo or cover) and set framing — preview below looks the same as in the public menu.
branding.coverFormats: Cover: JPG, PNG, WebP — max 5 MB
branding.dbSetupAfterSuffix: in the app. Make sure you ran SQL in the same project as in your .env file.
branding.logoScaleHelp: Logo framing. Move left to shrink; framing point sets the visible area when zoomed in.
branding.coverScaleHelp: Cover image framing. Move left to shrink; framing point selects the visible banner area.
branding.unsavedOtherElement: Unsaved changes in the other element

errors.coverTooLarge: Cover file is too large (max 5 MB).
errors.frameColumnsMissing: Framing columns are not visible in the API. Run the SQL migration (below), then in Supabase: Settings → API → Reload schema (or wait 1–2 min) and refresh F5.
